title: Hazelnut Paella
description: A rich and aromatic Paella dish infused with hazelnuts and traditional Portuguese flavors.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Sauté the diced onion and minced garlic until softened.
Add the chopped hazelnuts and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the uncooked Spanish rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the vegetable broth, smoked paprika, saffron threads, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes.
Remove the paella pan from the heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
